impacted_files.description: All files the grill session determined are potentially impacted by the task. plan.intended_files must be a subset of this array.

items.description: A single shell command as a string array, e.g. ["pytest", "tests/auth/"]

mandatory_verification_steps.description: Pool of valid verification commands. plan.verification_commands must be a subset of this array.

risk_notes.description: High-risk files, dependency edges, or cross-module concerns surfaced during the grill session.

requirements_ref.description: Path to the requirements.json snapshot this grill session was conducted against, if any.

human_approval.description: The Discovery Gate. Human attests the blast-radius analysis is correct before planning begins.
